title: ribes velutinum var. gooddingii
intro: Ribes velutinum var. gooddingii is a variety of the velvety gooseberry plant, native to the western United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ribes velutinum var. gooddingii include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
